Global (All).title: Russia-Ukraine War Intensifies
Global (All).summary: The conflict between Russia and Ukraine has escalated, with reports of increased fighting and civilian casualties.

Global (All).title: Global Economic Slowdown Concerns
Global (All).summary: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has warned of a potential global economic slowdown, citing rising inflation and declining trade.

Global (All).title: COVID-19 Cases Surge Globally
Global (All).summary: A new wave of COVID-19 infections is affecting multiple countries, with reports of increased hospitalizations and deaths.

United States.summary: US Capitol Police Officer Fatally Shot by Suspect - Multiple People Injured
Biden Signs Executive Order to Strengthen Cybersecurity After Massive Data Breaches
US Supreme Court Ruling on Gun Control Sparks Protests and Counter-Protests Across the Country

South Korea.title: S. Korea raises alert level for North Korea's 'preemptive attack'
South Korea.summary: South Korea says it has raised its alert level for potential North Korean attacks after Pyongyang threatened to take military action if challenged over its expanding nuclear capabilities.

South Korea.title: South Korea and the US begin largest-ever joint military drills
South Korea.summary: The annual joint military exercises between South Korea and the United States have commenced, with Seoul announcing a massive mobilization of 50,000 troops for large-scale military drills that have been widely condemned by Pyongyang.

South Korea.title: S. Korean police crack down on 'freedom of speech' protests
South Korea.summary: South Korean police have arrested over 100 protesters in Seoul today after they clashed with riot police during a protest against a government decision to ban a student-led festival that aimed to promote free speech.

Japan.title: Taiwan tensions surge as China holds military drills
Japan.summary:
Tensions between Taiwan and China have increased as China conducted large-scale 
            military drills in response to US Speaker Nancy Pelosi's visit to Taiwan. 
            Japan has expressed concern over the situation and is calling for calm.

Japan.title: North Korea fires ballistic missile over Japan
Japan.summary:
North Korea has fired a ballistic missile that flew over Japan, prompting an alert 
            and evacuation warnings. The missile was later confirmed to have landed in the 
            ocean. Japan's Prime Minister has condemned the launch and called for restraint.

Japan.title: Protests erupt in Tokyo over COVID-19 measures
Japan.summary:
Protests have broken out in Tokyo against the Japanese government's COVID-19 
            measures, including the wearing of masks and vaccination requirements. The 
            protests have been largely peaceful, but have disrupted traffic and commerce.
